format_data:
[{"fieldname": "print_heading_template", "fieldtype": "Custom HTML", "options": "

Status Change Form

{{ _(doc.name) }}

"}, {"fieldtype": "Section Break", "label": ""}, {"fieldtype": "Column Break"}, {"fieldname": "_custom_html", "print_hide": 0, "label": "Custom HTML", "fieldtype": "HTML", "options": "{% set emp = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, ["employee_name","branch"], as_dict=1) if doc.employee else {} %}
EMPLOYEE DETAILS
Name of Employee: {{ doc.employee_name or (emp.employee_name if emp else "") }} Employee: {{ doc.employee }}
Site Name: {{ emp.branch if emp else "" }}
Effective Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.effective_date, "d MMMM yyyy") if doc.effective_date else "" }}
{% set company_currency = frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "default_currency") if doc.company else "ZAR" %} {% macro money(value) -%} {%- if value is not none and value != "" -%} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(value, currency=company_currency) }} {%- else -%} {{ "" }} {%- endif -%} {%- endmacro %}
DESCRIPTION
{% if doc.current_contract_status or doc.new_contract_status %} {% endif %}
Description Present New
Designation or Job Title {{ doc.current_designation or "" }} {{ doc.new_designation or "" }}
Contract Status {{ doc.current_contract_status or "" }} {{ doc.new_contract_status or "" }}
Conditions of Employment {{ doc.current_conditions or "" }} {{ doc.new_conditions or "" }}
Basic / Hourly Rate {{ money(doc.current_rate) }} {{ money(doc.new_rate) }}
Travelling Allowance {{ money(doc.current_travel) }} {{ money(doc.new_travel) }}
Housing Allowance {{ money(doc.current_housing) }} {{ money(doc.new_housing) }}
Safety Bonus {{ money(doc.current_safety) }} {{ money(doc.new_safety) }}
Shift Allowance {{ money(doc.current_shift) }} {{ money(doc.new_shift) }}
Cellphone Allowance {{ money(doc.current_phone) }} {{ money(doc.new_phone) }}
Opencast Allowance {{ money(doc.current_opencast) }} {{ money(doc.new_opencast) }}
ROUTING
Site Manager Area HR HR HOD Payroll Relevant HOD
Name {{ doc.requested_by_name or "" }}
Signature
Date
NOTES / REASON
{{ doc.reason or "" }}
It has been agreed between the Parties that the Company will, on a temporary basis, provide the Employee with the Allowance(s) noted herein above. It is expressly agreed that this is not a condition of employment and may be revoked at any time at the sole discretion of the Employer.
I, {{ doc.employee_name }}, have acquainted myself with the above terms and conditions as well as the contents of the document, which I fully understand and accept.

{{ doc.employee_name }} — Employee Signature

Date
"}]
name: Status Change Form
